questions.promptTemplate:
This is the skill description of which skill? 

 {0}
entries: Gain momentum and begin to advance when passing another runner while well-positioned around halfway through the race.
Increase velocity by deriving the winning equation when passing another runner toward the front on the final corner or later.
A Lifelong Dream, A Moment's Flight
Give max effort when far from the lead on the final corner, moderately increasing velocity steadily for a duration proportional to distance from the lead.
The View from the Lead is Mine!
Slightly increase ability to break out of the pack on the straight after engaging in a challenge toward the front on the final corner or later.
Increase velocity enthusiastically when positioned toward the front in the second half of the race after recovering endurance with a skill.
Seize the moment when close to the runner behind on the final straight, slightly consuming endurance to greatly increase velocity for a moderate duration.
A Lifelong Dream, A Moment's Flight
Increase velocity with pretty princess power when engaged in a challenge on the final straight.
A Lifelong Dream, A Moment's Flight
Moderately increase velocity when positioned toward the front with about 300m remaining. If coming out of an uphill, greatly increase velocity instead.
Where There's a Will, There's a Way
Increase velocity with blossoming ambition when well-positioned and close to the runner ahead with 300m or less remaining.
Moderately increase velocity steadily with a long spurt starting halfway through the race.
Increase acceleration at an opportune moment when in the lead on a corner late-race.
Increase velocity with a blazing spirit when pressured by another runner in the front part of the pack on the final corner or later.
Increase velocity for a moderate duration when in the front part of the pack with 400m remaining. If at least 7 skills have been activated, greatly increase velocity for a moderate duration instead.
Greatly increase velocity on the final straight after passing another runner 3 times late-race.
If well-positioned late-race on the final corner or later, increase velocity. If there's a large distance left to the finish, also increase acceleration very slightly with perfect form.
Increase velocity with the stride of an empress when passing another runner from midpack or further back on the final corner.
Increase velocity with strong willpower on the final straight after passing another runner in the front part of the pack on the final corner or later.
Increase velocity with a surge of great fortune when pressured by another runner toward the back in the second half of the race.
If positioned toward the front on a straight late-race, increase velocity with high spirits. If the straight is on the backstretch, also increase acceleration very slightly.
If the skill user engaged in a challenge on a mid-race corner, increase acceleration when well-positioned late-race at least halfway through the final corner.
Increase velocity in a true display of skill with 200m remaining after racing calmly.
Greatly increase velocity with an indomitable fighting spirit on the final straight after being on the heels of another runner toward the front on the final corner or later.
Chase after an unseen friend when in midpack in the second half of the race, moderately increasing velocity steadily and very slightly intimidating runners ahead..
Moderately increase velocity with BAKUSHIN power when engaged in a challenge toward the front in the second half of the race.
Increase acceleration with blazing passion when aiming for the front from midpack on the final corner.
Slightly hang on to the advantage when positioned toward the front with energy to spare on the final straight.
Become stronger at challenging rivals and increase velocity when positioned toward the front with 200m or less remaining.
Increase ability to break out of the pack when engaged in a challenge in midpack on the final corner.
Where There's a Will, There's a Way
Recover endurance by relaxing after activating 2 skills when positioned midpack mid-race.
Moderately increase velocity with the stride of an empress when passing another runner from midpack or further back on the final corner.
If well-positioned at the start of the final straight, her strong willpower to win increases velocity. If positioned near the front, greatly increase velocity instead.
Increase velocity when starting to make a move from a position toward the front mid-race.
Suck endurance from runners ahead when well-positioned and pressured by another runner mid-race.
Increase velocity with the excitement of running when engaged in a challenge while well-positioned in the second half of the race.
Moderately increase acceleration in an attempt to move up on a corner late-race.
Control breathing and kick forward hard toward victory in the second half of the race after recovering endurance with skills at least 3 times.
Increase ability to break out of the pack on the straight after engaging in a challenge toward the front on the final corner or later.
Increase velocity when passing another runner toward the front on the final corner. If passing toward the back, increase acceleration instead.
The View from the Lead is Mine!
Moderately increase velocity with a strong turn of foot when passing another runner toward the back on the final straight.
Increase velocity when positioned toward the front after making it to the final straight without faltering.
Increase velocity with BAKUSHIN power when engaged in a challenge toward the front in the second half of the race.
Increase ability to break out of the pack when well-positioned and close to the runner ahead on the final straight.
Recover endurance and moderately increase velocity with newfound resolve when in midpack around halfway through the race.

If the skill user passes another runner on the final corner or later, increase velocity from the midpack onward on the final straight. If the skill user isn't one of the top favorites, muster resolve to keep steadily increasing velocity.
Increase velocity continuously with a patissiere's pride on the final straight after passing another runner 3 times on the final corner or later.
Moderately increase velocity with an arousal of fighting spirit when positioned 3rd and about to lose late-race.
Aim for the front with unwavering determination when passing another runner from midpack or further back on a corner late-race.
Clear a path forward with the power of divination when the way ahead is jammed late-race.
I See Victory in My Future!
Moderately recover endurance and slightly increase velocity for a moderate duration when sitting off the pace on a corner in the second half of the race.
If positioned toward the front with 200m remaining, increase velocity. Then, if also positioned near the leading Umamusume, gather strength to move slightly forward.
Increase velocity with flaring fighting spirit when positioned 3rd and about to lose late-race.
Moderately increase acceleration steadily with a wink when starting to make a move from midpack in the second half of the race.
Where There's a Will, There's a Way
If positioned toward the front from the start of the race until the second half of the race, good vibes recover endurance and moderately increase velocity steadily.
Increase velocity continuously when pressured by another runner and running out of energy toward the front on the final corner or later.
Where There's a Will, There's a Way
Increase acceleration in an attempt to move up on a corner late-race.
Greatly increase velocity with a dazzling display when just breaking out of the pack toward the front on the final straight.
If the skill user stays toward the very back during the first half of the race without being rushed, unleash fighting spirit to increase acceleration on the final straight.
From the midpack in the second half of the race, slightly increase velocity steadily for a duration based on remaining endurance.
Moderately clear a path forward with the power of divination when the way ahead is jammed late-race.
I See Victory in My Future!
Having run the race calmly, increase acceleration with hardened determination when making a move mid-race, or on a crucial corner late-race whilst in midpack.
Increase velocity with smoldering ambition when moving up from midpack on the final corner or later.
When competing for the lead if positioned in the midpack or further for the first half of the race, show off some Edo spirit and greatly increase velocity.
Increase velocity and navigation with the pure euphoria of being within breathing distance of precious waifus after passing another runner 2 times late-race.
If positioned toward the front with 350m or less remaining and there is another Umamusume close behind, the determination to stay ahead makes it easier to break out of the pack.
Take a slight breather and increase velocity when in the front part of the pack and detecting another runner coming from behind on a corner mid-race.
A Lifelong Dream, A Moment's Flight
Increase velocity with winning ambition when positioned toward the front on the final straight after engaging in a challenge on the final corner or later.
If the skill user passes another runner on the final corner or later, increase velocity with fiery fighting spirit when in the front part of the pack with 300m remaining.
Get hyped and increase velocity when pressured by or passing another runner while well-positioned on the final straight.
Increase velocity by deriving a path to victory mid-race after staying well-positioned from the start of the race up until the second half.
Greatly increase velocity in a true display of skill with 200m remaining after racing calmly.
Greatly recover endurance when well-positioned mid-race.
When passing another racer at the front part of the pack on the final corner or later, perform a dazzling display that greatly increases velocity for a moderate duration.
Moderately recover endurance and slightly increase velocity with newfound resolve when in midpack around halfway through the race.
Slightly swell with the determination to be number one when positioned toward the front in the second half of the race.
Increase acceleration by shifting gears when positioned toward the front on the final corner or later.
Swell with the determination to be number one when positioned toward the front in the second half of the race.
A Lifelong Dream, A Moment's Flight
Increase velocity in a dash for the lead after running calmly and according to plan up until the final straight.
Increase velocity with beastly strength when passing another runner on the outside on the final corner or later. If the skill user engaged in a challenge mid-race, greatly increase velocity instead.
Increase acceleration with a pow, a wow, and a bang when well-positioned upon approaching the final straight.
Ride the momentum to increase velocity and very slightly increase acceleration after passing another runner toward the front late-race.
Increase velocity with guidance from the stars when far from the lead on the final straight. If positioned around the very back, greatly increase velocity instead.
Greatly increase velocity with flashy footwork when closing the gap to runners ahead on the final straight.
Become empowered to keep the spotlight when positioned toward the front and close to the runner behind on a straight mid-race.
Recover endurance with a glance at nearby runners when positioned toward the back on the final corner.
Moderately recover endurance with a glance at nearby runners when positioned toward the back on the final corner.
Greatly recover endurance with a gentle light when overtaken toward the back mid-race.
Increase velocity with the determination to not be overtaken when positioned toward the front on the final corner.
Increase velocity by drawing on all remaining strength when in the lead by a fair margin in the second half of the race.
The View from the Lead is Mine!
Increase velocity with royal brilliance when positioned toward the front and close to the runner ahead or behind on the final corner or later.
When near the inner rail midpack on the final corner or later, calculate the path to victory, increasing velocity and ability to navigate smoothly on the final straight.
Greatly increase ability to break out of the pack by opening up a path when positioned toward the front with 200m remaining.
Recover endurance and moderately increase velocity for a moderate duration when sitting off the pace on a corner in the second half of the race.
Moderately increase velocity with winning ambition when positioned toward the front on the final straight after engaging in a challenge on the final corner or later.
Hang onto the advantage when positioned toward the front with energy to spare on the final straight.
If positioned toward the back and racing calmly until the start of the final corner, when there are 300m remaining, cast a magic spell to increase velocity continuously.
I See Victory in My Future!
Moderately increase velocity when positioned toward the front on the third corner in the second half of the race. Or, kick forward hard when toward the front on the backstretch late-race.
Slightly increase velocity with a long spurt starting halfway through the race.
Increase velocity with a strong turn of foot when passing another runner toward the back on the final straight.
Where There's a Will, There's a Way
If positioned midpack on a downhill just before late-race and there's a large distance left to the finish, enjoy the race to the fullest, increasing velocity.
Bolt down the track like lightning when well-positioned or aiming for the front from midpack on a straight in the second half of the race.
Become stronger at challenging rivals and moderately increase velocity when positioned toward the front with 200m or less remaining.
Increase velocity on the final straight after passing another runner on the outside toward the back on the final corner or later.
Kick forward hard with renewed vigor when starting to get tired while well-positioned halfway through the race.
Where There's a Will, There's a Way
